actions.expression:
SELECT cgfkhdsheet.sid,
       cgfkhdsheet.gcmc,
       cgfkhdsheet.hkrq,
       cgfkhdsheet.hkje,
       cgfkhdsheet.fpje,
       cgfkhdsheet.yfhj,
       cgfkhdsheet.sfjq,
       cgfkhdsheet.bank,
       cgfkhdsheet.zh,
       cgfkhdsheet.gcmc1,
       cgfkhdsheet.ybank,
       cgfkhdsheet.yzh,
       cgfkhdsheet.htsh,
       cgfkhdsheet.ywhd,
       cgfkhdsheet.sfzk,
       cgfkhdsheet.zkje,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkhj,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkhj1,
       cgfkhdsheet.gcfp,
       cgfkhdsheet.htje,
       cgfkhdsheet.ywbtgyy,
       cgfkhdsheet.bzsm,
       cgfkhdsheet.fpyz,
       cgfkhdsheet.fpbh,
       cgfkhdsheet.wxfp,
       cgfkhdsheet.zzsl,
       cgfkhdsheet.tsl,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkbz,
       cgfkhdsheet.bhsj,
       cgfkhdsheet.bkpje,
       cgfkhdsheet.se,
       cgfkhdsheet.tse,
       cgfkhdsheet.jsrm,
       cgfkhdsheet.sh,
       cgfkhdsheet.yt,
       cgfkhdsheet.province,
       cgfkhdsheet.city,
       cgfkhdsheet.gcdh,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkdq,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkxh,
       cgfkhdsheet.sb,
       cgfkhdsheet.dlrq,
       cgfkhdsheet.customer,
       cgfkhdsheet.wstt,
       cgfkhdsheet.cxbg,
       cgfkhdsheet.zkfy1,
       cgfkhdsheet.htrq,
       cgfkhdsheet.chcpzl,
       cgfkhdsheet.zsl,
       cgfkhdsheet.xshj,
       cgfkhdsheet.kkje,
       cgfkhdsheet.yfje1,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkn,
       cgfkhdsheet.fky,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkr,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkdx,
       cgfkhdsheet.nsz,
       cgfkhdsheet.ysz,
       cgfkhdsheet.rsz,
       cgfkhdsheet.yhje,
       cgfkhdsheet.yhje1,
       cgfkhdsheet.fksb,
       cgfkhdsheet.pk,
       cgfkhdsheet.xgqd,
       cgfkhdsheet.fkdh,
       cgfkhdsheet.SerialID1,
       cgfkhdsheet.jzrq,
       cgfkhdsheet.ly
FROM cgfkhd,cgfkhdsheet 
WHERE (cgfkhd.sid=cgfkhdsheet.pid) 
  AND (cgfkhd.jzrq=[财务付款核对.截止日期]) 
  AND (cgfkhd.fpwk=[财务付款核对.是否现金]) 
  AND (cgfkhdsheet.fkdq=[财务付款核对.付款资料.付款地区]) 
  AND (cgfkhdsheet.cwpath=[财务付款核对.财务PATH]) 
  AND ((cgfkhdsheet.wstt=[财务付款核对.我司抬头]) 
  OR (cgfkhdsheet.wstt is null)) 
ORDER BY cgfkhdsheet.ywhd desc

actions.name: 对应采购付款
actions.caption: 对应采购付款
actions.expression:
SELECT gchk.sid 
FROM gchk 
WHERE (gchk.sb=[财务付款核对.付款资料.识别]) 
ORDER BY gchk.sid ASC

actions.name: 对应异地采购付款
actions.caption: 对应异地采购付款
actions.expression:
SELECT ydhk.sid 
FROM ydhk 
WHERE (ydhk.sb=[财务付款核对.付款资料.识别]) 
ORDER BY ydhk.sid ASC
